---
name: App profile request
about: Request support for a specific Windows application
title: "[APP PROFILE] "
labels: app-profile
assignees: ''
---

## Application details

- **App name:** (e.g. Microsoft Excel)
- **Process name:** (e.g. EXCEL.EXE)
- **App version:** (e.g. 365, 2021)
- **Windows version:** (e.g. Windows 11)
- **Is it WebView2-based?** (yes/no — check with windowsagent observe and look for Chrome_WidgetWin_1)

## Use case

What do you want to automate in this app?

## Known quirks

Any UIA/accessibility issues you've observed:
- Does the app have virtualised lists?
- Does it steal focus unexpectedly?
- Does standard scroll work?
- Are there custom-rendered controls with no accessibility info?

## Are you willing to help build this profile?

- [ ] Yes, I can test and contribute code
- [ ] I can test but not code
- [ ] I'm just requesting
